name: browser-toolbox
description: Nineteen no-upload, fully client-side browser tools (QR, EXIF cleaner, passphrase, password vault, CSV<->JSON, palette, cron, encode/decode, JWT decoder, image resizer, Morse code, cipher studio, TOTP/2FA generator, hash & checksum verifier, barcode generator & reader, text diff, regex tester, timestamp & UUID, contrast checker) as an installable PWA.
